summary: First-finish smoke testing of Satthamma Farms MVP. Backend (products, auth, admin CRUD, orders, categories, role checks) and Frontend (home hero + Telugu tagline, products page with 12 cards + filters, add-to-cart badge update, admin login redirect to /admin dashboard with stats) all working. Minor field-name difference in POST /api/orders payload noted (uses address/phone, not shipping_address) — verify frontend Checkout matches.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin → HTTP 200, role=admin, JWT token issued (field name: 'token')
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token → HTTP 200 returns admin profile
POST /api/auth/register creates customer → HTTP 200, returns token+user
POST /api/products (admin) creates product → HTTP 200; DELETE /api/products/{id} → HTTP 200
POST /api/products with customer token → HTTP 403 (role guard)
Home page renders hero, Telugu tagline 'prathiokkari intaa, nanyamaina panta', CTAs, stats
Header nav (Home, Our Products, Our Story, Contact, Sign in, Cart) visible and functional
Products page shows 12 product cards with category filter tabs (All/Grains/Pulses/Pickles/Masalas & Spices/Seeds/Cotton/Other) and search input
Add-to-cart from product card updates cart badge to 1
Admin dashboard shows stats (12 PRODUCTS, 1 ORDERS, 2 USERS) + tabs Products/Orders/Users + Add product form

failed.issue: POST /api/orders expects fields 'address' (string) and 'phone' at top level, not 'shipping_address' object. Not a bug per se, but ensure frontend Checkout.jsx sends the matching schema.
failed.evidence: 422 when sending {shipping_address:{...}}; 200 when sending {items, address, phone}

action_items: Confirm frontend Checkout page posts {items, address, phone} matching backend OrderCreate schema (already testable via UI end-to-end in next pass).
